## Verification

### Checklist

- [ ] `python3 -m tools.verify.main`
- [ ] `bun run verify`
- [ ] No secrets or credentials added
- [ ] Code remains readable without hidden workflow or policy drift
- [ ] Business logic remains aligned with the active planning packet and owner docs
- [ ] Proper documentation was updated for any durable behavior or structure change

### Docs and ADR delta

- Planning:
- ADR:
- Docs or ADR delta:
- Operations delta:

### Scope

- [ ] Small and focused enough to review safely
- [ ] Protected-path rationale is documented when required
- [ ] Root docs remain the only canonical documentation surface
- [ ] Full governance impact was reviewed for changed controls, templates, or owner docs

### Tests

- [ ] Required lint, typecheck, and test commands passed
- [ ] Local tests updated or added where logic or verifier rules changed
- [ ] Test coverage remains appropriate for the changed logic path
